# We Recruit IT

> Nearshore IT staffing and recruiting company connecting Latin American tech talent with global companies.

We Recruit IT specializes in two core services: Staff Augmentation (embedded LATAM engineers with payroll, hardware, and onboarding handled) and Direct Hiring (success-based recruiting with a 1-year guarantee). With over a decade of experience, we help companies build distributed engineering teams across Latin America.

## Blog

Our blog covers insights on nearshore IT staffing, recruiting strategies, and building distributed engineering teams.

- [Why Nearshore Staff Augmentation is the Smart Choice for US Companies](https://blog.teamswerecruit.com/blog/nearshore-staff-augmentation/): How nearshore staff augmentation in Latin America gives US companies access to elite engineering talent, timezone alignment, and cost advantages.
- [Staff Augmentation vs. Outsourcing: Which Model Fits Your Team?](https://blog.teamswerecruit.com/blog/staff-augmentation-vs-outsourcing/): A practical comparison of staff augmentation and project outsourcing for engineering leaders.
